title: Task 1 Thinker Perception Output

x.description: Object x position in the canonical Task 1 table frame, meters.

y.description: Object y position in the canonical Task 1 table frame, meters.

yaw.description: Object yaw in the canonical Task 1 table frame, radians.

description: Minimal perception output for the future camera -> Thinker -> planner path. This schema intentionally excludes final grasp poses, robot commands, planner metadata, and evaluator fields.
